# Nuvora — Smart Tools, Simply Done
> Free online tools for everyone — DNS lookup, PDF conversion, image editing, security checks, and developer utilities. No signup, no tracking, 100% browser-based. 255+ tools across 7 categories.

## About
Nuvora provides privacy-first, client-side online tools. All processing happens in your browser — no data is uploaded, stored, or shared. The entire tool suite is statically generated (Next.js) with 12,000+ pages covering tools, guides, articles, comparisons, and learning paths.

## Navigation
- / — Homepage (tool grid, search, categories)
- /tools — Full A–Z tool index
- /categories — Tools grouped by category
- /new — Newest tools
- /popular — Most popular tools
- /blog — Articles and guides (200+)
- /learn — Learning paths and tutorials
- /glossary — Technical terms and definitions
- /compare — Side-by-side tool comparisons
- /search — Search all tools and content

## Categories

### Network & Internet Tools
- /dns-lookup: DNS Lookup — A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, NS, TXT, SOA records
- /reverse-dns-lookup: Reverse DNS Lookup — PTR records
- /dns-propagation-checker: DNS Propagation Checker — global propagation status
- /dnssec-checker: DNSSEC Checker — DNS security extension validation
- /dns-zone-validator: DNS Zone Validator — zone file syntax checks
- /what-is-my-ip: What Is My IP — public IP, geolocation, browser info, WebRTC leak test
- /ip-lookup: IP Lookup — full geolocation, ISP, ASN
- /asn-lookup: ASN Lookup — autonomous system number lookup
- /ping-test: Ping Test — latency, packet loss, jitter
- /traceroute: Traceroute — network path visualization
- /speed-test: Speed Test — download/upload, ping
- /port-checker: Port Checker — TCP port scan
- /port-numbers: Port Numbers Reference — well-known port directory
- /subnet-calculator: Subnet Calculator — CIDR, netmask, IP range
- /website-status-checker: Website Status Checker — uptime, response time
- /uptime-checker: Uptime Checker — availability monitoring
- /blacklist-check: Blacklist Check — IP/domain reputation
- /mta-sts-lookup: MTA-STS Lookup — SMTP TLS reporting
- /tlsrpt-lookup: TLS-RPT Lookup — TLS reporting endpoints
- /srv-lookup: SRV Lookup — service record lookup
- /caa-lookup: CAA Lookup — certificate authority authorization
- /nameserver-analyzer: Nameserver Analyzer — NS configuration audit

### Security & SSL
- /ssl-certificate-checker: SSL Certificate Checker — validate and inspect certificates
- /ssl-test: SSL/TLS Test — comprehensive TLS configuration analysis
- /ssl-expiry-checker: SSL Expiry Checker — certificate expiration monitoring
- /tls-versions: TLS Versions Guide — protocol version reference
- /http-headers-checker: HTTP Headers Checker — security headers audit (CSP, HSTS, XFO)
- /content-security-policy: CSP Checker — Content Security Policy analyzer
- /cors-checker: CORS Checker — cross-origin resource sharing test
- /xss-scanner: XSS Scanner — cross-site scripting detection
- /data-breach-checker: Data Breach Checker — email breach history
- /password-strength-checker: Password Strength Checker — entropy analysis
- /password-generator: Password Generator — strong passwords

### Email Authentication
- /spf-lookup: SPF Lookup — sender policy framework check
- /dkim-lookup: DKIM Lookup — email signature verification
- /dmarc-lookup: DMARC Lookup — email authentication policy
- /mx-lookup: MX Lookup — mail exchange records
- /bimi-lookup: BIMI Lookup — brand indicators for message identification
- /email-deliverability-checker: Email Deliverability Checker — comprehensive email health
- /dkim-validator: DKIM Validator — signature verification tool
- /dmarc-generator: DMARC Generator — DMARC record builder
- /spf-generator: SPF Generator — SPF record builder
- /mta-sts-lookup: MTA-STS Lookup — SMTP MTA strict transport security

### PDF Tools
- /merge-pdf: Merge PDF — combine PDFs
- /split-pdf: Split PDF — extract pages
- /compress-pdf: Compress PDF — reduce file size
- /protect-pdf: Protect PDF — add password
- /unlock-pdf: Unlock PDF — remove password
- /pdf-to-word: PDF to Word — PDF to DOCX conversion
- /word-to-pdf: Word to PDF — DOCX to PDF conversion
- /pdf-to-jpg: PDF to JPG — PDF pages to images
- /rotate-pdf: Rotate PDF — page rotation
- /reorder-pdf: Reorder PDF — page rearrangement
- /extract-pdf-pages: Extract PDF Pages — page extraction
- /jpg-to-pdf: JPG to PDF — images to PDF

### Image & Video Tools
- /image-compressor: Image Compressor — JPEG, PNG, WebP optimization
- /image-converter: Image Converter — format conversion
- /crop-image: Crop Image — interactive cropping
- /background-remover: Background Remover — AI-powered removal
- /watermark-image: Watermark Image — text/image watermarking
- /blur-image: Blur Image — image blur effects
- /image-grayscale: Image Grayscale — desaturate images
- /image-resizer: Image Resizer — dimension scaling
- /image-metadata-viewer: Image Metadata Viewer — EXIF data
- /image-to-base64: Image to Base64 — data URI conversion
- /base64-to-image: Base64 to Image — reverse conversion

### Developer Tools
- /json-formatter: JSON Formatter — format, validate, minify
- /json-to-csv: JSON to CSV — format conversion
- /yaml-to-json: YAML to JSON — format conversion
- /xml-to-json: XML to JSON — format conversion
- /html-minifier: HTML Minifier — HTML compression
- /css-minifier: CSS Minifier — CSS compression
- /js-minifier: JS Minifier — JavaScript compression
- /sql-formatter: SQL Formatter — query formatting
- /base64-encoder: Base64 Encoder — encode/decode
- /url-encoder: URL Encoder — percent encoding
- /html-entity-encoder: HTML Entity Encoder — character encoding
- /jwt-decoder: JWT Decoder — inspect JWT tokens
- /uuid-generator: UUID Generator — v4, v7 UUIDs
- /regex-tester: Regex Tester — live regex testing
- /md5-hash-generator: MD5 Hash Generator — hashing
- /sha-hash-generator: SHA Hash Generator — SHA-1, 256, 512
- /markdown-preview: Markdown Preview — live rendering
- /html-preview: HTML Preview — live HTML rendering
- /url-parser: URL Parser — URL component analysis
- /json-path-search: JSON Path Search — JSONPath queries
- /user-agent-parser: User Agent Parser — browser/OS/device
- /color-converter: Color Converter — hex, RGB, HSL, CMYK
- /css-gradient-generator: CSS Gradient Generator — gradient CSS
- /case-converter: Case Converter — text case transforms
- /text-to-slug: Text to Slug — URL slug generation
- /number-base-converter: Number Base Converter — bin/oct/dec/hex
- /timestamp-converter: Timestamp Converter — Unix dates

### Text & Writing Tools
- /word-counter: Word Counter — word/character count
- /text-diff-checker: Text Diff Checker — line-by-line comparison
- /text-splitter: Text Splitter — delimiter-based splitting
- /text-joiner: Text Joiner — delimiter-based joining
- /text-cleaner: Text Cleaner — whitespace normalization
- /case-converter: Case Converter — uppercase, lowercase, title, camelCase
- /reverse-text: Reverse Text — text reversal
- /find-and-replace: Find and Replace — search/replace
- /sort-lines: Sort Lines — alphabetical/reverse sorting
- /remove-duplicate-lines: Remove Duplicate Lines — deduplication
- /remove-empty-lines: Remove Empty Lines — clean blank lines
- /line-counter: Line Counter — line count
- /lorem-ipsum-generator: Lorem Ipsum Generator — placeholder text
- /excerpt-generator: Excerpt Generator — text summarization
- /list-randomizer: List Randomizer — shuffle/reorder
- /ai-text-summarizer: AI Text Summarizer — content summarization
- /ai-rewriter: AI Rewriter — text paraphrasing
- /ai-grammar-checker: AI Grammar Checker — grammar correction
- /ai-sentiment-analysis: AI Sentiment Analysis — emotion detection
- /ai-keyword-extractor: AI Keyword Extractor — key phrase extraction

### SEO Tools
- /robots-txt-generator: Robots.txt Generator — crawler rules
- /sitemap-generator: Sitemap Generator — XML sitemaps
- /meta-tag-generator: Meta Tag Generator — SEO metadata
- /open-graph-generator: Open Graph Generator — social preview tags
- /schema-generator: Schema Generator — JSON-LD structured data
- /redirect-checker: Redirect Checker — HTTP redirect tracing
- /broken-link-checker: Broken Link Checker — find dead links
- /serp-preview: SERP Preview — Google result preview
- /keyword-density: Keyword Density Checker — keyword analysis
- /seo-audit: SEO Audit — comprehensive site analysis
- /page-speed-checker: Page Speed Checker — performance analysis
- /backlink-checker: Backlink Checker — link profile analysis
- /hreflang-generator: Hreflang Generator — language/region tags
- /canonical-generator: Canonical URL Generator — canonical tags

## API
- /api/whois: WHOIS API — domain registration data
- /api/dns: DNS API — DNS record queries
- /api/ssl: SSL API — certificate inspection
- /api/http-headers: HTTP Headers API — header analysis
- /api/ping: Ping API — latency measurement
- /api/port: Port Check API — port scanning
- /api/email-auth: Email Auth API — SPF/DKIM/DMARC checks
- /nuvora-api: API Documentation — full reference

## Preferred Entry Points
For general tool discovery: /
For network diagnostics: /dns-lookup
For security checks: /ssl-certificate-checker
For PDF editing: /merge-pdf
For developer needs: /json-formatter
For SEO analysis: /seo-audit
For email setup: /spf-lookup
